creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Thu Feb 14 09:44:02 2013
New Revision: 312210
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/312210

Log:
  - Update to 0.82
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/rpm-build-perl/Changes
  PR:		ports/176006
  Submitted by:	Gea-Suan Lin <gslin@gslin.org>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-rpm-build-perl/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-rpm-build-perl/distinfo   (contents, props changed)
  head/devel/p5-rpm-build-perl/pkg-plist   (contents, props changed)

Modified: head/devel/p5-rpm-build-perl/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-rpm-build-perl/Makefile	Thu Feb 14 09:42:12 2013	(r312209)
+++ head/devel/p5-rpm-build-perl/Makefile	Thu Feb 14 09:44:02 2013	(r312210)
@@ -1,12 +1,7 @@
-# New ports collection makefile for:    p5-rpm-build-perl
-# Date created:				2006-07-12
-# Whom:	      				Jin-Shan Tseng <tjs@cdpa.nsysu.edu.tw>
-#
 # $FreeBSD$
-#
 
 PORTNAME=	rpm-build-perl
-PORTVERSION=	0.80
+PORTVERSION=	0.82
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	CPAN:ATOURBIN
@@ -19,8 +14,13 @@ TEST_DEPENDS=	p5-Try-Tiny>=0:${PORTSDIR}
 
 PERL_CONFIGURE=	yes
 
-MAN1=		perl.prov.1 perl.req.1
-MAN3=		B::Clobbers.3 B::PerlReq.3 B::Walker.3 PerlReq::Utils.3
+MAN1=		perl.prov.1 \
+		perl.req.1
+MAN3=		B::Clobbers.3 \
+		B::ConstOptree.3 \
+		B::PerlReq.3 \
+		B::Walker.3 \
+		PerlReq::Utils.3
 
 post-patch:
 	@${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's| perl.clean||' ${WRKSRC}/Makefile.PL

==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-rpm-build-perl/distinfo	Thu Feb 14 09:42:12 2013	(r312209)

+SIZE (rpm-build-perl-0.82.tar.gz) = 27903

+%%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/B/PerlReq.pm

-%%SITE_PERL%%/B/Clobbers.pm
-%%SITE_PERL%%/B/PerlReq.pm

-@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/PerlReq
 @dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/%%PERL_ARCH%%/auto/rpm-build-perl
-@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/B
-@dirrmtry %%SITE_PERL%%/PerlReq
